## Meeting Purpose

[Align marketing efforts and clarify roles between GrowthX and Surge's PR agency (cmand.co) for Surge AI.](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [cmand.co handles earned comms (PR, media relations, brand awareness) for Surge; GrowthX focuses on events, content production, and amplification](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Potential overlap in events strategy; need to coordinate efforts and prioritize earned vs. paid opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Content production for Surge is mostly in-house; GrowthX exploring new content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Data annotation tech brand focus: GrowthX supporting hiring efforts, not brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [Liz (GrowthX): New account strategist for complex accounts, including Surge](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Tania, Riley, Chelsea (cmand.co): PR agency team for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in content production and amplification (events)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [cmand.co focuses on earned communications, media relations, and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### GrowthX's Current Work Streams

  - [Events:](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
      - [VIP experiences, nurturing dinners in SF and NY](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Seeking co-hosting opportunities with large names](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
      - [Conference participation (e.g., AI Engineer keynote, data summit)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Sponsorships: Lanyards, coffee carts ($5k spend for smaller events)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Content:](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Currently stalled for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Pitching new ideas and mock-ups](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Data annotation tech focus: Sourcing experienced coders (hiring-focused)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Amplification:](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [Podcast recommendations (no direct involvement)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [Challenges with positioning Surge's niche AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### cmand.co's PR and Communications Work

  - [Earned media strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Building relationships with media outlets](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Driving brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Securing speaking opportunities for Edwin and other leaders](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Reactive PR work](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Advising on messaging for owned channels](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Content Strategy and Ownership

  - [Surge's content mostly in-house (Mason handling Edwin's LinkedIn posts)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [cmand.co aiming to support content tied to media relations](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring new content strategies, awaiting feedback on pitches](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

### Events and Speaking Opportunities

  - [cmand.co focuses on earned speaking spots](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [GrowthX handles paid sponsorships and VIP experiences](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Need for better coordination to avoid redundancy](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Suggestion: Approach earned opportunities first, then consider paid options](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

### Data Annotation Tech Brand

  - [GrowthX starting work on this sub-brand (kicked off last week)](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Focus on sourcing experienced coders, not brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [cmand.co not involved with data annotation tech brand](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

### Brand Identity and Messaging

  - [cmand.co has more developed brand identity for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Offer to share context to inform GrowthX's approach to events, signage, and swag](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Liz to loop in Gloria (GrowthX events lead) for alignment on events strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [cmand.co to share brand identity context with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Maintain open communication between teams to avoid duplication of efforts](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Liz to meet with Gloria and Jason to discuss outcomes and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Continue async communication for ongoing alignment](https://fathom.video/share/uz1XhB3yTuxvpTLrAyFBVoi6MP2e1H-m?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
